preToolUse.bash: case "$COPILOT_TOOL_NAME" in shell) ARGS=$(echo "$COPILOT_TOOL_ARGS" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); for CMD in sudo 'rm -rf /' mkfs dd 'curl.*|.*sh' 'wget.*|.*sh'; do echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "$CMD" && echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Omni policy: blocked dangerous command"}' && exit 0; done;; esac; echo '{"permissionDecision":"allow"}'
